identified_failure_step.description: The name of the step or component where the failure was identified

failure_pattern.description: Short description of the recurring failure or divergence pattern

yaml_backbone.description: Full YAML string of the regenerated skill definition

step_content.description: Updated prompt markdown for each step

output_schemas.description: JSON schema objects for each step's output

changelog.description: Short summary of changes made and rationale

targeted_failure_cases.description: List of run IDs that this evolution targets (originally failing)

expected_improvement.description: One sentence predicting the expected outcome of these changes
